texto: Like Garth Brooks said about it, you need to live where you could honestly choose, if you had to, on whether to give up one yesterday for one more tomorrow, you have to be able to say no to that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John Schmidt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Like Garth Brooks said about it, you need to live where you could honestly choose, if you had to,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, garth-brooks, music pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de music.
